title: oxalis goniorhiza
intro: Oxalis goniorhiza, also known as the "sensitive plant" due to its compound leaves that fold up when touched, is a flowering plant native to tropical Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Oxalis goniorhiza include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating various skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Oxalis goniorhiza is often prepared as a tea or tincture, and its leaves can also be used to make a salve or ointment for topical application.
